title: Employer — request placement drive (DRV-E04 + DRV-E05 + DRV-C03)
oneLiner: Automated tester entry: request a drive at an approved campus, then college approves it for students.

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Next step signs in as employer automatically.

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Employer dashboard loads.

steps.label: Open campus tie-up directory
steps.observe: Colleges list with Approved / Pending badges.

steps.label: Request tie-up with IIT Madras (if not already Approved)
steps.observe: Toast confirms request, or row already shows Approved.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College dashboard loads.

steps.label: Open Employer Partnership Requests
steps.observe: Pending list shows TechCorp Solutions if a request was sent.

steps.label: Approve TechCorp partnership request
steps.observe: TechCorp row approved or already absent from pending list.

steps.label: Log in as employer again
steps.observe: Employer hub loads — ready to request a drive.

steps.label: Navigate to Placement Drives
steps.observe: Placement Drives list or empty state visible.

steps.label: Open Request placement drive form
steps.observe: Full-page request form with campus selector and drive fields.

steps.label: Select IIT Madras campus
steps.observe: Campus dropdown shows Indian Institute of Technology, Madras.

steps.label: Type drive title (includes session marker GT-…)
steps.observe: Title field shows {{marker}} SDE Placement Drive.

steps.label: Select drive type — On campus
steps.observe: Drive type shows On campus.

steps.label: Set drive date (future)
steps.observe: Drive Date field shows 15 Dec 2026.

steps.label: Type venue
steps.observe: Venue shows CRC Seminar Hall A.

steps.label: Type notes for placement office
steps.observe: Notes include guided test marker.

steps.label: Type openings for the role
steps.observe: Openings field shows 10.

steps.label: Type skills for the role
steps.observe: Skills: Java, DSA, SQL.

steps.label: Type job description
steps.observe: Description includes guided test marker.

action.value: SDE campus role for {{marker}} guided test. Strong CS fundamentals required.

steps.label: Type minimum CGPA
steps.observe: Min CGPA field shows 7.5.

steps.label: Type eligible branches
steps.observe: Eligible branches shows All.

steps.label: Type batch year (2026 — matches seeded students)
steps.observe: Batch year field shows 2026.

steps.label: Type min CTC (annual INR)
steps.observe: Min CTC shows 800000.

steps.label: Type max CTC (annual INR)
steps.observe: Max CTC shows 1200000.

steps.label: Review form before submit
steps.observe: Campus, title, date, and venue populated.

steps.label: Click Submit request
steps.observe: Success toast; returns to drives list; new row with Requested / Awaiting approval status.

steps.label: Confirm drive appears in employer list
steps.observe: Table/list shows {{marker}} in title column. College must approve before students apply.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College hub loads — approve the drive request.

steps.label: Open college Placement Drives
steps.observe: Drive row shows Awaiting Approval for {{marker}}.

steps.label: Approve guided drive for campus
steps.observe: Row with {{marker}} — click Approve (skipped if already Approved).

steps.label: Confirm drive status is Approved
steps.observe: Status pill shows Approved. Students can now browse and apply.
